definition: Reduction in hazard intensity probability or direct physical threat
measurement_note: Use engineering environmental ecological climate and land-management evidence

definition: Reduction in people ecosystems infrastructure services or assets located in harm's way
measurement_note: Use hazard maps land-use data asset inventories and community exposure knowledge

definition: Reduction in susceptibility to harm when hazard occurs
measurement_note: Assess housing health poverty ecosystem condition labor access and public service dependency

definition: Ability to prepare respond maintain essential functions recover and learn
measurement_note: Review early warning evacuation shelters logistics response capacity governance and mutual aid

definition: Extent to which DRR protects highly exposed groups and addresses historical or structural vulnerability
measurement_note: Use disaggregated exposure recovery participation investment and access data

definition: Risk that DRR creates false security shifts harm deepens future vulnerability or displaces people
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger review safeguards and community scrutiny
